summary: Iteration 142 - Returning Customer Notifications feature tested successfully. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including Settings toggle, POS customer search, and toast notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: Returning Customer Notifications feature implemented correctly
Backend: Customer search at /api/member-pages/{page_id}/pos-customers/search triggers notify_returning_customer when enabled
Backend: WebSocket RETURNING_CUSTOMER notification type added in websocket_notifications.py
Frontend: Settings tab contains 'Returning Customer Alerts' toggle with [data-testid='returning-customer-notifications-toggle']
Frontend: Toggle shows cyan (ON) / gray (OFF) state correctly
Frontend: POSTerminal.jsx selectCustomer shows VIP toast (star emoji) for 5+ orders
Frontend: POSTerminal.jsx selectCustomer shows 'Welcome back!' toast for 2+ orders with last visit info
Frontend: POSTerminal.jsx selectCustomer shows simple 'Customer selected' toast for 1 order
Customer search returns order_count, total_spent, last_purchase for notification logic
seed_data_creation: Used existing test customers from iteration 141: John AutoFill Test and Test Customer POS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 142 tested returning customer notifications feature. All working. Settings tab has toggle for 'Returning Customer Alerts'. POS customer search shows suggestions with order history. Customer selection shows enhanced toast based on order count: VIP (5+ orders), Welcome back (2+ orders), or simple selection (1 order). WebSocket notification triggers for returning customers when enabled.
